items.name: Big Mac®
items.description: Mouthwatering perfection starts with two 100% pure all beef patties and Big Mac® sauce sandwiched between a sesame seed bun. It's topped off with pickles, crisp shredded lettuce, finely chopped onion, and a slice of melty American cheese.
items.longDescription: Mouthwatering perfection starts with two 100% pure all beef patties and Big Mac® sauce sandwiched between a sesame seed bun. It's topped off with pickles, crisp shredded lettuce, finely chopped onion, and a slice of melty American cheese. Two all-beef patties, special sauce, lettuce, cheese, pickles, onions â€” on a sesame seed bun.

items.name: Quarter Pounder® with Cheese
items.description: A quarter pound of 100% fresh beef, hot off the grill and seasoned with just a pinch of salt and pepper. Topped with two slices of melty American cheese, slivered onions, tangy pickles, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted sesame seed bun.
items.longDescription: A quarter pound of 100% fresh beef, hot off the grill and seasoned with just a pinch of salt and pepper. Topped with two slices of melty American cheese, slivered onions, tangy pickles, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted sesame seed bun. Weight before cooking: 4 oz.

items.name: Double Quarter Pounder® with Cheese
items.description: Two quarter pound 100% fresh beef patties, hot off the grill and seasoned with just a pinch of salt and pepper. Topped with two slices of melty American cheese, slivered onions, tangy pickles, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted sesame seed bun.
items.longDescription: Two quarter pound 100% fresh beef patties, hot off the grill and seasoned with just a pinch of salt and pepper. Topped with two slices of melty American cheese, slivered onions, tangy pickles, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted sesame seed bun. A double dose of deliciousness.

items.name: Bacon Quarter Pounder® with Cheese
items.description: A quarter pound of 100% fresh beef, topped with thick-cut Applewood smoked bacon, two slices of melty American cheese, slivered onions, tangy pickles, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted sesame seed bun.
items.longDescription: A quarter pound of 100% fresh beef, topped with thick-cut Applewood smoked bacon, two slices of melty American cheese, slivered onions, tangy pickles, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted sesame seed bun. The perfect combination of beef and bacon.

items.name: McDouble®
items.description: A classic double burger featuring two 100% pure beef patties seasoned with just a pinch of salt and pepper, topped with tangy pickles, chopped onions, ketchup, mustard, and a slice of melty American cheese on a toasted bun.
items.longDescription: A classic double burger featuring two 100% pure beef patties seasoned with just a pinch of salt and pepper, topped with tangy pickles, chopped onions, ketchup, mustard, and a slice of melty American cheese on a toasted bun. Big flavor at a great value.

items.name: Cheeseburger
items.description: A simple, satisfying classic. A 100% pure beef patty seasoned with just a pinch of salt and pepper, topped with a slice of melty American cheese, tangy pickles, chopped onions, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted bun.
items.longDescription: A simple, satisfying classic. A 100% pure beef patty seasoned with just a pinch of salt and pepper, topped with a slice of melty American cheese, tangy pickles, chopped onions, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted bun. The McDonald's cheeseburger that started it all.

items.name: Double Cheeseburger
items.description: Two 100% pure beef patties with two slices of melty American cheese, tangy pickles, chopped onions, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted bun. Double the beef, double the cheese, double the deliciousness.
items.longDescription: Two 100% pure beef patties with two slices of melty American cheese, tangy pickles, chopped onions, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted bun. Double the beef, double the cheese, double the deliciousness.

items.longDescription: The original McDonald's burger. A 100% pure beef patty seasoned with just a pinch of salt and pepper, topped with tangy pickles, chopped onions, ketchup, and mustard on a toasted bun. Simple, classic, and delicious since 1955.

items.name: McCrispy®
items.description: Crispy, juicy, tender perfection. A Southern-style fried chicken fillet on a toasted, buttery potato roll with crinkle-cut pickles. Simple, bold, and unforgettable.
items.longDescription: Crispy, juicy, tender perfection. A Southern-style fried chicken fillet on a toasted, buttery potato roll with crinkle-cut pickles. Simple, bold, and unforgettable. Also available Spicy and Deluxe.

items.description: Dive into a wild-caught Alaskan Pollock filet, breaded and fried to golden perfection, with creamy tartar sauce and a slice of melty American cheese, all on a soft, steamed bun.
items.longDescription: Dive into a wild-caught Alaskan Pollock filet, breaded and fried to golden perfection, with creamy tartar sauce and a slice of melty American cheese, all on a soft, steamed bun. A McDonald's classic since 1962.

items.longDescription: Fresh, crisp apple slices. A wholesome snack or side that's a great complement to any meal. Perfect for kids and adults alike.

items.longDescription: Cool, creamy, and caffeinated. A sweet blend of rich caramel flavor with coffee, milk, and ice, topped with whipped topping and caramel drizzle. A McCafé® favorite.
